XRP Ledger Launches World's First On-Chain Programmable Privacy with RISC-V ZK Verifier | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRPL Commons and Boundless confirmed rollout of a RISC-V zero-knowledge verifier directly on the XRP Ledger, enabling programmable privacy and compliance—the first for any public blockchain—alongside staged Q2 launches of Smart Escrows and Smart Vaults.[2]
